findings.description: The candidate rule list is empty. Multiple critical brand rules present in this source document—such as the asymmetric CTA border-radius formula, specific hex color constraints for CTA layers, and the strict fallback background color policy—have not been extracted.

payload.description: The CTA button must strictly use the four-value asymmetric border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px. Under no circumstances may this be simplified to a single value, have its corners swapped, or have its decimals rounded.
payload.enforcement_governance: This shape is a signature brand asset element and is required on all instances, even if the background image fallback is triggered.
